samplingFrame: 41-document stratified corpus spanning four cases (American Revolution, Napoleon, Lincoln, Nazi Germany) under Koenigsberg's Law of Sacrifice, selected via the sacrifice-law-workbench manifest-driven pipeline. PPW #250 confirms american-revolution as the PPW target for American Revolution; Napoleon still requires a PPW case folder before its subset can be imported. Corpus import into PPW is planned for Milestone 17.
notes: caseIds lists the PPW case folders that currently exist and are mapped for this corpus (american-civil-war-union, american-revolution, nazi-germany). The Napoleon mapping is recorded in cases.json as proposedPpwCaseId napoleonic-france, but that case folder does not yet exist. No documents imported yet as of Milestone 17. Claim promotion is separate from corpus availability and requires PPW review gates.
